Defines a sequence of vibration notes with durations, strengths, and a repeat pattern for a device.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file defines a sequence of vibration patterns for a device. Each entry in the `notes` array specifies a vibration note with attributes such as `id`, `vibe_duration_ms` (vibration duration in milliseconds), `brake_duration_ms` (pause duration in milliseconds), and `strength` (intensity of the vibration). The `pattern` array lists the order in which these notes should be played, creating a specific sequence. The `repeat_delay_ms` value indicates the delay in milliseconds before the pattern repeats. The `comments` field provides a label or description for the pattern, in this case, "Reveille."
